description:
In this episode of This is My Architecture, Adam walks us through Graham Media Group's modernization journey. Learn about media data ingestion, transformation and enrichment with Amazon Elemental, Amazon Transcribe and Amazon Rekognition. See how AWS helped a traditional TV station to focus on its business rather than undifferentiated heavy lifting of infrastructure. 

~Filmed prior to COVID-19~
